|---|---|---|

| 2 | open_telemetry_opentelemetry_collector_contrib_exporter_opensearchexporter | +395 MB |

rationale: These are CURRENT RANK numbers from top_patterns (real 24h bytes); framing them as "growth Δ" is rearrangement. cost_drivers showed no growth on this env.
